overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a rainy, neon-lit dystopian city at night. The character navigates wet streets, passes under an overpass, briefly enters a 'Brain Wash' establishment, and continues through an urban environment with industrial buildings, palm trees, and scattered traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial street with overhead power lines and passing vehicles

events.description: red car passes by on the left side of the street
passing pedestrians walking in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily along the rainy sidewalk next to industrial buildings, observing the passing traffic

notable_agents.action: red sedan driving past on the wet street with headlights reflecting off the pavement

entered.detail: tall industrial structures with scaffolding and metal frameworks silhouetted against the fog
dense network of electrical wires and cables crisscrossing above the street
rain-slicked concrete sidewalk reflecting the glow of street lights and vehicle headlights
low-rise buildings with glowing windows and neon signs

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a rain-soaked sidewalk in an industrial district, with tall metal structures on the left and commercial buildings on the right. Power lines crisscross overhead as vehicles pass by on the wet street, their headlights cutting through the hazy night air.

scene_state.functional_zone: street approaching concrete overpass with commercial establishments

events.description: approaching the concrete overpass, environment becomes more enclosed
large military-style truck passes by on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk toward the Brain Wash establishment, passing under the approaching overpass

notable_agents.action: large armored truck driving past with bright headlights illuminating the rain
pedestrian walking ahead toward the overpass entrance

entered.detail: large circular neon sign with purple and red text reading BRAIN WASH
massive concrete bridge structure spanning across the street ahead
illuminated advertising billboard visible in the distance through the fog

segments.scene_description: As the character approaches the concrete overpass, the industrial buildings give way to commercial establishments. A prominent neon sign for 'Brain Wash' glows in the distance, while a large military truck rumbles past on the right. The space becomes more enclosed as the overpass looms ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: entrance lobby of Brain Wash establishment with metal doors

events.description: entering the Brain Wash building from the rainy street
exiting the building back to the rainy street

agents.ego_description: character walks into the Brain Wash entrance, pauses briefly facing the interior metal doors, then turns and exits back to the sidewalk

entered.detail: double metal doors with horizontal slats and frosted glass panels
warm orange ceiling lights illuminating the small entrance area
illuminated advertisement posters on the interior walls

segments.scene_description: The character steps inside the Brain Wash building, entering a dimly lit lobby with metal slatted doors and warm interior lighting. After a brief pause, the character exits back onto the rainy street, returning to the hazy neon-lit environment outside.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk under overpass with graffiti-covered walls and digital billboards

events.description: emerging from under the overpass back into the open rainy street
passing by illuminated storefronts and digital advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk under and then past the overpass, passing other pedestrians and observing the urban graffiti and neon signage

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: concrete walls covered in colorful graffiti and street art
large illuminated digital screen displaying advertisements with pink and purple graphics
small commercial shops with neon lighting and metal shutters

segments.scene_description: Exiting the Brain Wash building, the character continues under the concrete overpass, passing graffiti-covered walls and illuminated storefronts. The environment transitions from the enclosed underpass back to the open street, with digital billboards glowing through the rain and fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with palm trees and traffic signals

events.description: approaching intersection, waiting for vehicles to pass before crossing
crossing the street at the intersection
entering area with palm trees lining the street

agents.ego_description: approaching the intersection, pausing for traffic, then crossing the wet street and continuing along the road lined with palm trees

notable_agents.action: black SUV driving through the intersection with headlights on

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the street ahead, silhouetted against the foggy sky
traffic signals showing red lights glowing in the rain
marked pedestrian crossing on the wet asphalt with white stripes
contemporary commercial buildings with glass facades and neon accents

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a busy intersection, waiting for a black SUV to pass before crossing the rain-slicked street. After crossing, the environment opens up to reveal palm trees lining the road and modern buildings, with traffic lights glowing red against the foggy night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked industrial district that gradually transitions into a neon-lit commercial hub. It begins on a wet sidewalk flanked by tall metal structures and crisscrossing power lines, moving forward as the industrial landscape gives way to commercial storefronts and the glow of a distant Brain Wash sign. The camera then follows the character into the dimly lit lobby of the Brain Wash establishment before exiting back into the hazy night air to pass under a concrete overpass lined with graffiti. As the character emerges from the enclosed underpass, the scene opens up toward a busy intersection where digital billboards pierce through the fog. Finally, the camera crosses a rain-slicked street to reveal a more modern urban environment characterized by glowing red traffic lights and palm trees lining the road.
